specs.title: at-matrix
specs.summary: This matrix records assistive-technology (AT) test results for the representative component set defined in `at-methodology.md`. Testing was performed manually; stacks not available in the current environment are marked `not tested`. Results are point-in-time â€” re-run when components change.

specs.title: at-methodology
specs.summary: This document defines cascade's assistive-technology (AT) testing methodology.

specs.title: brand-color
specs.summary: | Token                      | oklch value             | Approx hex | Usage                                                                                                                            | | -------------------------- | ----------------------- | ---------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | `--cascivo-brand-primary`  | `oklch(0.55 0.15 240)`  | `#0079bf`  | Hero bg, CTA button, logo gradient start                                                                                         | | `--cascivo-brand-accent`   | `oklch(0.72 0.13 195)`  | `#00bdbe`  | Gradient end, accent UI, flow highlights                                                                                         | | `--cascivo-brand-ink`      | `oklch(0.22 0.03 250)`  | `#101c28`  | Wordmark on light, body text on brand surfaces                                                                                   | | `--cascivo-brand-paper`    | `oklch(0.99 0.005 250)` | `#f9fcff`  | Brand surface (hero, OG card background)                                                                                         | | `--cascivo-brand-gradient` | â€”                       | â€”          | `linear-gradient(135deg, var(--cascivo-brand-primary), var(--cascivo-brand-accent))` â€” hero fill, logo gradient variant, OG card |

specs.title: cascivo-launch-checklist
specs.summary: Code prerequisites completed in v15 T1â€“T4. External steps the owner must perform:

specs.title: chart-palette
specs.summary: The `--cascivo-chart-1..8` tokens are grounded in the **Okabe-Ito 8-color palette**, the de-facto standard for scientific figures requiring color vision deficiency (CVD) safety.

specs.title: Color Usage
specs.summary: cascade uses a three-level token system for color. AI agents and component authors must use semantic tokens, never primitive color values.

specs.title: Content Tone
specs.summary: cascade components with user-visible chrome text (labels, aria strings, empty states) follow these voice guidelines.

specs.title: Before/After Context Impact Demo
specs.summary: Reproducible comparison: each prompt run twice.

specs.title: Decision Hierarchy
specs.summary: When guidance conflicts, resolve it in this order:

specs.title: legal-mapping
specs.summary: Cascade targets WCAG 2.2 AA conformance at the component level. All three major accessibility frameworks â€” EAA, EN 301 549, and US Section 508 â€” reference WCAG as their technical standard.

specs.title: mobile-audit-docs
specs.summary: | Location                  | Class/element               | Issue                                                                                                                     | | ------------------------- | --------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | `app.css:73`              | `.doc-page`                 | `max-width: 760px` â€” not constrained to viewport width; becomes effectively `760px` when padding pushes content           | | `app.css:34`              | `.page`                     | `padding: var(--cascivo-space-6)` fixed â€” 1.5rem each side on a 320px screen leaves 272px usable, no sub-30rem adjustment | | `app.css`                 | No `@media` blocks at all   | Zero responsive behavior in global CSS                                                                                    | | `app.css:90`              | `.doc-head h1`              | `font-size: var(--cascivo-text-3xl)` fixed â€” no fluid scaling on small screens                                            | | `app.css:243`             | `.code-shiki pre`           | `overflow-x: auto` present but no font-size reduction at narrow widths                                                    | | `app.css:161`             | `.table-wrap`               | `overflow-x: auto` present but no scroll hint; no stacked layout at narrow screens                                        | | `app-shell.module.css:63` | `@media (max-width: 64rem)` | Only breakpoint: nav becomes off-canvas drawer (already implemented in AppShell). No sub-375px handling.                  | | `ChartsPage.tsx`          | Chart components            | No explicit width constraints; charts could overflow if SVG viewBox expands beyond container                              | | `PlaygroundPage.tsx`      | Side-by-side split pane     | `display: flex` horizontal split with no responsive stack at narrow widths                                                | | `app.css:133`             | `.doc-meta-grid`            | `minmax(160px, 1fr)` â€” at 320px with padding, this fits ~1 col but edge case worth verifying                              |

specs.title: mobile-audit-landing
specs.summary: | Location          | Class/element                      | Issue                                                                                                                                                                | | ----------------- | ---------------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | | `landing.css:67`  | `.hero-ctas`                       | No `flex-wrap` â€” two buttons overflow at 320px                                                                                                                       | | `landing.css:60`  | `.hero-tagline` / `.hero-sub`      | `max-width: 44rem` â€” fixed, not `min(100%, 44rem)`                                                                                                                   | | `landing.css:543` | `.principles`                      | 4-col at base, only collapses at `32rem` â€” at 320px the border-inline-end creates visual orphan                                                                      | | `landing.css:694` | `.console-body`                    | `grid-template-columns: auto 1fr` â€” `auto` side-nav is fixed-width, causes overflow below 56rem                                                                      | | `landing.css:713` | `.console-grid`                    | `1fr 1fr` collapses at 56rem but console-body doesn't align with that                                                                                                | | `landing.css:742` | `.kpi-row`                         | 4-col â†’ 2-col at 56rem â†’ 1-col at 32rem: the 56remâ†’32rem gap (375â€“512px) still shows 2 cols                                                                          | | Header            | `ShellHeader` nav                  | All nav links visible at all widths; no hamburger/off-canvas at mobile                                                                                               | | `landing.css:308` | `.footer-columns`                  | 3-col â†’ 1-col at `max-width: 32rem` â€” uses max-width (desktop-first)                                                                                                 | | `landing.css:335` | Multiple `@media (max-width: ...)` | All breakpoints are desktop-first `max-width`; no mobile-first `min-width` base                                                                                      | | Various           | `.section`                         | `max-width: 1040px` with `padding: ... var(--cascivo-space-6)` â€” at 320px `space-6` = 1.5rem each side = 3rem total from 320px = 272px content, acceptable but tight | | `landing.css:377` | `.json-playground-demo`            | `1fr 1fr` grid â†’ collapses at `max-width: 48rem` (desktop-first)                                                                                                     | | `.signals-grid`   | `landing.css:920`                  | `2fr` â†’ 1fr at `40rem` (desktop-first)                                                                                                                               | | `.agents-grid`    | `landing.css:987`                  | `2fr` â†’ 1fr at `56rem` (desktop-first)                                                                                                                               |

specs.title: parity-matrix

specs.title: perf-methodology
specs.summary: This document diagnoses the current state of the per-component incremental bundle matrix before any fixes land (T3-T2 and later). Read `apps/bench/METHODOLOGY.md` for the overall benchmark methodology; this doc focuses specifically on the incremental matrix and the two known defects that corrupt its output.

specs.title: Spacing
specs.summary: cascade uses a fixed spacing scale defined as `--cascivo-space-*` tokens. All spacing in components must reference these tokens rather than hard-coded pixel values.

specs.title: t5-deferral
specs.summary: **Status:** Deferred within v13 **Decision date:** 2026-06-13 **Tranche:** T5 (CSS-native progressive enhancement)

specs.title: wcag-2.2
specs.summary: Three criteria added in WCAG 2.2 require explicit cascade handling. This document records the implementation approach and verification status for each.
